name: Lost Unity
explicitMods: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill
flavourText: All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

name: Blunderbore
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Projectile Gems
explicitMods: 72% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
You have Lesser Brutal Shrine Buff
You have Lesser Massive Shrine Buff
flavourText: The giant cares not for the ants.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +3 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a circle of knives outwards around the caster which deal physical damage.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, brand skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional 2 times
Supported Skills have 62% more Cast Speed
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Skills have 24% increased Area of Effect per Repeat
Supported Skills deal 14% more Spell Damage per Repeat
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: She gazed into the mirror...
and the mirror gazed back.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill. Minions, Totems, Traps and Mines cannot gain Inspiration Charges.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 40% less Mana Cost

Gain an Inspiration Charge when you Spend Mana on Upfront
Costs or Effects of Supported Skills
Lose all Inspiration Charges after Spending a total of 922 Mana on Upfront Costs and Effects of Supported Skills
Supported Skills deal 5% more Elemental Damage per Inspiration Charge
Supported Skills have 8% increased Critical Strike Chance per Inspiration Charge
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 40% increased Chaining range
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell will track how much mana you spend on it, granting a buff when the total mana spent reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, mines or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods:
Gain Arcane Surge after Spending a total of 461 Mana on
Upfront Costs and Effects of a Supported Skill

Arcane Surge grants 20% increased Cast Speed
Arcane Surge grants 30% increased Mana Regeneration rate
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Skills deal 35% more Spell Damage while you have Arcane Surge
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 22% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Entropy Trail
explicitMods: 9% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
12% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike
6% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed while you have Onslaught
25% increased Effect of Tailwind on you
You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies in an area at both ends of the teleport. Deals higher damage to chilled enemies, then removes chill from them. Cannot be supported by Unleash.

19% more Damage with Hits per 5% Chill Effect on Enemy

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your cast speed is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining. Requires mana.

Deals 70% of your Maximum Mana as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Mana per second as Fire Damage

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
26% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 9% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect

20% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
craftedMods: 25% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
fracturedMods: 48% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.

Your and nearby allies' Skills Cost no Mana
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that lets you and your allies cast skills without paying their mana costs.

name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 28% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

Can have up to 10 active spinning blades

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
89% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
60% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff giving more poison damage and a chance to inflict poison. When you poison an enemy while you have this buff, you gain Virulence, and summon an Agony Crawler minion that uses projectile and area attacks. You will lose Virulence over time, at a rate which increases the more Virulence you have. The minion will die when you have no Virulence.
explicitMods: Buff grants 20% chance to Poison on Hit
Grants Virulence when you Poison an Enemy
Buff grants 10% more Damage with Poison
Agony Crawler has 5% increased Attack Speed per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler deals 9% increased Physical Damage per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler has 51 to 94 Added Physical Damage per Virulence you have
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which adds lightning damage to spells and attacks. If you kill a shocked enemy, this skill will create a storm, causing lightning bolts to strike enemies around you for a duration. The damage inflicted by this skill is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Storm Hits an Enemy every 0.25 Seconds
Storms Hit Enemies with 20% increased Frequency
Creates a storm when you Kill a Shocked Enemy
Buff grants 20 to 81 Added Attack Lightning Damage
Buff grants 20 to 81 Added Spell Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff adding cold damage to spells and attacks. If you shatter an enemy, this skill will cause them to explode and deal AoE cold damage to enemies near them. This damage is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Buff grants 40 to 61 Added Attack Cold Damage
Buff grants 40 to 61 Added Spell Cold Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

name: The Golden Charlatan
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
1% increased Critical Strike Chance per 4% Quality
explicitMods: Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"
